acquisition method: operating in a data-dependent mode using a CID based method.
alkylation reagent: alkylated in 200 mM Iodoacetamide (IAA) for 45 min in dark.
alkylation concentration: alkylated in 200 mM Iodoacetamide (IAA) for 45 min in dark.
cleavage agent: using trypsin, chymotrypsin, and chymotrypsin-trypsin digestion.
collision energy: CID fragmentation was performed at 35% of normalized collision energy.
instrument: connected to an Orbitrap Elite mass spectrometer.
ionization type: possessing an EASY-Spray nano-electrospray ion source.
reduction reagent: mixed with one volume of 100 mM tris(2-carboxyethyl) phosphine (TCEP).
reduction concentration: mixed with one volume of 100 mM tris(2-carboxyethyl) phosphine (TCEP).
